titleStmt.title: SII 11.198: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 198. (B.K. No. 85 of 1926-27.) MUḶGUND, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A BROKEN SLAB LYING IN FRONT OF THE CHĀVAḌI.

summary.p: This inscription contains two grants, the first dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 48, Śō[bhakṛit], Śrāvaṇa, śu. 5, Thursday, saṅkrānti, vyatīpāta. This date appears to be irregular. In Śōbhakṛit, Śrāvaṇa śu. 5 fell on Sunday, 29th June, A.D. 1123; it was not a day of any saṅkrānti. The date of the second grant is Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 49, Krōdhi, Bhādrapada, śu. 5, Monday, saṅkrānti, vyatīpāta. This date is also irregular. Śu 5 of Bhādrapada in Krōdhin fell on Saturday = 16th August, A.D. 1124, which was not a day of saṅkrānti. The first registers a gift of cesses made by several seṭṭis for the offerings of the god Vidurēśvara (at Muḷugunda), after washing the feet of Amṛitarāśi-Muni, disciple of Sōmēśvara-Paṇḍita, disciple of Rudraśakti-Paṇḍita. The second registers a gift of oil made by the Fifty Families of Muḷugunda for the perpetual lamp of the same god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
varu bhallu
dvātriṁṣadvēḷāmarama
matadiṁdāda śrīmadayinū
seṭṭi haḍavaḷa dēvadāsiseṭṭi dāsiseṭṭi
katteya kāḷiseṭṭi kakkeya sōviseṭṭi katteya
riya kētiseṭṭi mattiya dēvaṇna rebbiseṭṭiya siṁ gaṇna koḷḷiya māriseṭṭi kambali
ra kāḷiseṭṭi māṇikaseṭṭi māḷiseṭṭi muḍiyadēvaṇna lakki guṁdada holliseṭṭi mailikabbe
ya kētiseṭṭi kāḷiseṭṭiya magaṁ caṁdiyaṇna gavaṟe taili seṭṭi hattiya sōbiseṭṭi magam
ṟe bīriseṭṭi Intiva rmmukhyamāgi taḷasamasta virddu śrīmaccāḷukya vikramakālada 48neya śō
tsarada śrāvaṇaśuddha paṁcami brihaspativāra saṁkrānti byatīpātadandu svasti yamaniyamasvādhyā
maunadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhānajapasamādhiśīḷasampannaruṁ daśakuśaḷadha(n)rmmōpārjji tānūnapu(ṁ)ṇyapumjōdaya
pingaḷāmbhōdhivarddhanasaraccaṁdraruṁ parbbatāvaḷiviḷasitadharmmakīrttilatikākaṁda rappa śrīmatu rudraśaktipaṁḍitara
śiṣyaru dasadharmmanirmmitarappa śrīsōmēśvarapaṁḍitara śiṣyaru . kaṁda . taṁtammapēkṣe geḷasuvavaṁ tā paṁcēṁdriyaveṁba gaja
maṁ jñānāṁkuśadiṁ tāṁ tegeda pariyalīyade saṁtaysiye gelda namritarāśimunīśa . © Ā mahāmunigaḷa pā
daprakṣāḷanaṁ māḍi śrīvidurēśvaradēvara nivēdyakke biṭṭa dharmma veṁteṁdaḍe Oṁdettu Oṁdu kattemātanādaḍa vokkalu O
kkala lirbbaḷa bhatta haḍikada bhaṁḍi girbbaḷa bellada bhaṁḍige vī 2 . marana baṁḍige vī 1 bidira bhaṁḍige vī 1 Intī dharmmamaṁ
svadharmmadiṁ pratipāḷisidavargge gaṁge gaṁgāsāgara prayāge vārāṇasi kurukṣētra śrī parvvata viṁtinitu tīrtthaṁgaḷoḷu sāsira kavile
ya kōḍumaṁ koḷagumaṁ paṁcaratnadiṁ kaṭṭisi sāsirbba rvvēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇargge koṭṭanitu phaḷa vintī dharmmama naḷidavaru Ani
tuṁ tīrtthaṁgaḷoḷu sāsira kavileyumaṁ sāsirbba rbrāhmaṇaruma naḷida mahāpāta ka rṇnarakakke gaḷagaḷa niḷivaru .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harētu vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭhāyām jāyatē krimi . ©
© Aḍigaḍige kuḍuva surataru veḍaṟaḍasida budharge dānaciṁtāmaṇigaḷu taḍeya
de suradhēnugaḷene kuḍuveḍeyoḷu negarḻda telliga rkkēvaḷave . Intenisi negarḻda śrī madādivaṭṭaṇaṁ
muḷugundada Aivattokkalu virḻdu śrīmaccāḷukyavikramakālada 49neya krōdhi samvatsarada bhādrapadaśuddha paṁ
cami sōmavāra saṁkrānti byatīpātadaṁdu śrīvidurēśvaradēvara naṁdādīvigege biṭṭa soṁṭige Ī dharmmamaṁ svadharmma
diṁ pratipāḷisidavargganantapuṇya Ida naḷidava rṇnarakakke gaḷagaḷa niḷivaru . saudhore gē taṇana dēgulakke
Etti deṇneyoḷage soṁṭige Eraḍu .
Digital edition of SII 11.198 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
